mapper.select:
SELECT ISNULL(A.ORDER_NO, '') orderNo, ISNULL(A.CUSTOMER_CODE, '') customerCode, ISNULL(A1.CUSTOMER_NAME, '') customerName, M.ITEM_LOT_NO lotNo, X1.MATERIAL_CODE itemCode, X1.MATERIAL_NAME itemName, X1.MATERIAL_SPEC itemSpec, ISNULL(A.ORDER_QTY, 0) orderQty, --수주량 X.WORK_CODE workCode, X3.WORK_NAME workName, X2.MATERIAL_CODE prodItemCode, X2.MATERIAL_NAME prodItemName, X2.MATERIAL_SPEC prodItemSpec, X.WORKDT_DATE workDtDate, X.PROD_QTY workQty, --작업지시량 ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) prodQty, ISNULL(S.GOOD_QTY,0) goodQty, ISNULL(S.BAD_QTY,0) badQty, ISNULL(D.QC_QTY,0) qcQty, D.BAD_SEQ badSeq, ISNULL(D.QC_CODE, '') qcCode, ISNULL(PD.QC_NAME, ISNULL(D.QC_CODE, '')) qcName, X.PROD_QTY-ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) remainQty, CASE WHEN ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(D.QC_QTY,0) * 100.0 / ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) END rate, CASE WHEN ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(D.QC_QTY,0) * 100.0 / ISNULL(S.PROD_QTY,0) END defectRate, X.FACTORY_CODE, X.PRODPLAN_DATE, X.PRODPLAN_SEQ, X.PRODWORK_SEQ, X.WORK_SEQ, S.PROD_SEQ prodSeq, S.TPR601ID tpr601Id, X.TPR504ID tpr504Id FROM TPR504 X
LEFT JOIN TPR301 P ON X.FACTORY_CODE = P.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = P.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = P.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND X.PRODWORK_SEQ = P.PRODWORK_SEQ
LEFT JOIN TPR301M M ON X.FACTORY_CODE = M.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = M.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = M.PRODPLAN_SEQ
LEFT JOIN TPR301R A ON X.FACTORY_CODE = A.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = A.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = A.PRODPLAN_SEQ LEFT JOIN TCO601 A1 ON A.FACTORY_CODE = A1.FACTORY_CODE AND A.CUSTOMER_CODE = A1.CUSTOMER_CODE
LEFT JOIN TCO403 X1 --제품 ON X.ITEM_CODE = X1.MATERIAL_ID
LEFT JOIN TCO403 X2 --생산품 ON X.PROD_CODE = X2.MATERIAL_ID
LEFT JOIN TPR102 X3 --공정 ON X.FACTORY_CODE = X3.FACTORY_CODE AND X.WORK_CODE = X3.WORK_CODE
INNER JOIN TPR601 S ON X.FACTORY_CODE = S.FACTORY_CODE AND X.PRODPLAN_DATE = S.PRODPLAN_DATE AND X.PRODPLAN_SEQ = S.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND X.PRODWORK_SEQ = S.PRODWORK_SEQ AND X.WORK_SEQ = S.WORK_SEQ
INNER JOIN TPR605 D ON S.FACTORY_CODE = D.FACTORY_CODE AND S.PRODPLAN_DATE = D.PRODPLAN_DATE AND S.PRODPLAN_SEQ = D.PRODPLAN_SEQ AND S.PRODWORK_SEQ = D.PRODWORK_SEQ AND S.WORK_SEQ = D.WORK_SEQ AND S.PROD_SEQ = D.PROD_SEQ
LEFT JOIN TPR109 PD ON D.FACTORY_CODE = PD.FACTORY_CODE AND D.WORK_CODE = PD.WORK_CODE AND D.QC_CODE = PD.QC_CODE
WHERE ISNULL(X.DELETE_FLAG,'') != '1'
AND X.WORKDT_DATE >= REPLACE(#{dateFrom}, '-', '')
AND X.WORKDT_DATE <= REPLACE(#{dateTo}, '-', '')
AND CONVERT(char(8), S.PROD_ETIME, 112) >= REPLACE(#{completeFrom}, '-', '')
AND CONVERT(char(8), S.PROD_ETIME, 112) <= REPLACE(#{completeTo}, '-', '')
AND P.WORKCENTER_CODE = #{workplace}
AND X.EQUIP_SYS_CD = #{equipment}
AND D.QC_CODE = #{defectCode}
ORDER BY X.PRODPLAN_DATE, CAST(X.PRODPLAN_SEQ AS INT), CAST(X.WORK_SEQ AS INT), CAST(S.PROD_SEQ AS INT), CAST(D.BAD_SEQ AS INT) OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
